---
title: "Vincent Rupp Portfolio"

about: 
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vincentrupp1/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:vjrupp49@gmail.com

listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false

page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
